mcp_servers.name: weather-mcp
mcp_servers.description: Global weather MCP server — current conditions and N-day forecast for any city, postcode, or lat/lng worldwide. Powered by Open-Meteo (free, no API key required for normal use). Replaces the US-only NWS-based servers.
mcp_servers.post_install_message: Requires `uv` (one-time: `pip install uv` or `brew install uv`). First invocation downloads the package and dependencies into an isolated env automatically — no separate pip install needed.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.short_description: Task management, workplace memory, visual dashboard
plugins.description: Manage tasks (TASKS.md), build up workplace memory (people, projects, terminology, shorthand), and operate from a visual dashboard. Includes /start to bootstrap, /update to sync from connectors, and a memory-management skill that decodes nicknames/acronyms/codenames so the agent acts like a colleague. Forked from anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins with empty .mcp.json — install the connectors you actually use via /mcp install.
